mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ACTIVITYTYPE ORDER BY type_sort
SELECT * FROM ACTIVITYTYPE WHERE type_status = 1 ORDER BY type_sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACTIVITYTYPE(type_name, type_desc, type_sort) VALUES(#{typeName}, #{typeDesc}, #{typeSort})
mapper.update: UPDATE ACTIVITYTYPE SET type_name = #{typeName}, type_desc = #{typeDesc}, type_sort = #{typeSort} WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
UPDATE ACTIVITYTYPE SET type_status = #{typeStatus} WHERE type_id = #{typeId}
